description.value:
Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Sei-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Harm Gate, improving the bonuses to +6 Strength and Dexterity, and +20 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signature increases by two steps, and the temporary Chakra gained increases to 12. In addition, you gain a +4 bonus to Initiative, as well as Balance, Climb, Jump, Swim and Tumble checks.

The damage you take increases to 5 damage per round, and the fatigue lasts for 10 minutes after the encounter ends. The save DC is unchanged (20), but even on a successful save you will be @Condition[fatigued]{fatigued} until the end of the encounter. If the Gate was open for more than 1 round, you take a cumulative -2 penalty to all ability scores for 24 hours after the Gate closes.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 4 per round, limits the penalty to ability scores to -4, and you recover from the penalty to ability scores after 8 hours of rest.
